chapter_title.ar: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الِاثْنَيْ عَشَرَ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَيْهِمْ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – What has come regarding the twelve and the text upon them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/231)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/231)
text: يَكُونُ تِسْعَةُ أَئِمَّةٍ بَعْدَ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ تَاسِعُهُمْ قَائِمُهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Saeed Bin Gazwan, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There would happen to be nine Imams<sup>asws</sup> after Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>, the ninth of them<sup>asws</sup> being their<sup>asws</sup> Qaim<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 15. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sa‘id ibn Ghazwan from abu Basir who has said the following. “I heard abu Ja‘far say, ‘after al-Husayn ibn Ali (a.s.) there will be nine Imams. The ninth of them will be Al-Qa’im (the one who will with Divine Authority).”
